name: head_flush_single

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.6 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] Single-line ［＃改行天付き、折り返してM字下げ］ — the single-line 改行天付き form (rendered as the same hanging-indent block): the first line is flush to the head (天付き, amount 0) and wrapped lines indent by M.
